node.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Sunset Grill

node.name: Sunset Grill
node.description: Family-friendly breakfast chain with classic options. Good for kids with simple menu and quick service.

node.name: Island Cafe Picnic Lunch
node.description: Casual picnic-style lunch on Centre Island. Sandwiches and snacks from the island cafe. Relaxed outdoor dining.

node.name: The Keg Steakhouse
node.description: Classic steakhouse with something for everyone. Family-friendly atmosphere with reliable menu. Good for groups.
